description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, angular layout. The exterior features a mix of brown and white wall finishes, large windows, and multiple outdoor terraces, including a rooftop area with seating and a prominent tree planter. The front facade is symmetrical, with a central entryway flanked by landscaped greenery and a paved walkway leading to the door. The house includes several outdoor amenities such as a patio, a swing set, and a fenced yard, enhancing its residential appeal. The window arrangement is varied, with both large picture windows and smaller, regularly spaced panes, providing ample natural light. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with outdoor elements.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and multiple terraces, featuring landscaped gardens and outdoor amenities. The design is angular and open, with a mix of brown and white finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical landscaping, and central walkway leading to the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, rooftop terrace, and a fenced yard with a swing set.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large outdoor patio, rooftop tree planter, and extensive window coverage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing additional terraces, a secondary entry, and more landscaped areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and regular smaller panes
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, a paved walkway, and symmetrical landscaping; modern door with minimal overhang
